text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, I accompany Nishino Flower in waiting
for one of her flowers to bloom. Apparently, it
only blooms at night.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hm... It should bloom any moment now...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yawn...
choice_data_list: You all right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I usually go to bed at this time, so I'm a bit
sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I'm going to do my best to stay up tonight! I
want to be here when this flower blooms!
choice_data_list: Then let's stay and wait a little longer.
You shouldn't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but please don't push yourself, okay? I was
the one who made you come out here with me,
after all...
choice_data_list:
Right back at you. Don't push yourself either,
got it?

Right back at you. Don't push yourself either,
got it?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and I continue to chat while
waiting for the flower to bloom...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?! I-I wasn't asleep, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There's no telling when the flower will bloom, so I
have to stay alert!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower fights valiantly against her
drowsiness, but as time passes, the flower bud
remains stubbornly shut...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, the flower is still tightly closed
when the sun rises...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...
choice_data_list: Flower. Wake up.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I-it's morning already?! Sorry, I didn't mean to fall
asleep!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Did the flower—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: I'm sorry. It didn't.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
No, it's okay. I knew these flowers don't bloom
very often. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I had a great time waiting here with you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If, um... we ever have the chance, will you watch
the flower with me again?
choice_data_list: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though the flower didn't bloom, my bond
with Nishino Flower feels a little stronger than
before.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Here's to another night of flower watching!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want you to catch a chill, so I brought
some hot tea with me. Here you go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and I drink tea and chat while
waiting for the flower to bloom...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, the flower is still tightly closed
when the sun rises...
choice_data_list: It's too bad it didn't bloom this time either...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But I'm sure it'll bloom next time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So—
choice_data_list:
Let's try waiting for it again another night,
okay?

Let's try waiting for it again another night,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though the flower didn't bloom, my bond
with Nishino Flower feels a little stronger than
before.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm not overdoing it! Just look at how full of
energy I—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh...
choice_data_list: Do you want to take a nap?
Do you want to take a nap?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: B-but...
choice_data_list:
Staying up the entire night won't do you any
favors.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll take a short nap.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but make sure you don't overdo it either,
Trainer!
choice_data_list: I won't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to take turns napping and coming
back out to check on the flower...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Nishino Flower and I both sleep straight
through to the next morning. When we wake up,
we both rush to the flower in a panic to see...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Haha... Of course it bloomed last night.
choice_data_list: I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's okay! You don't need to apologize! I
mean, I fell asleep too, so...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. It's funny, though, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe we both slept straight through it
blooming.
choice_data_list:
I guess that makes us real birds of a feather,
huh?

I guess that makes us real birds of a feather,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I guess it does. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though the flower didn't bloom, my bond
with Nishino Flower feels a little stronger than
before.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower

energy I—

text_block_list.text: Yawn...

text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.text: B-but...
choice_data_list:
Staying up the entire night won't do you any
favors.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower

through to the next morning. When we wake up,
we both rush to the flower in a panic to see...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Haha... Of course it bloomed last night.
choice_data_list: I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, it's okay! You don't need to apologize! I
mean, I fell asleep too, so...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. It's funny, though, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe we both slept straight through it

I guess that makes us real birds of a feather,
huh?

huh?

text_block_list.text: Hehe. I guess it does. ♪

before.
